<!--
PR REVIEW TEMPLATE — for reviewers (human or AI agent).
Post as a PR review comment. Keep the headings so findings stay parseable.
The "Reviewed by" line at the bottom is MANDATORY — state the exact model name.
-->

## Review summary
<!-- 2-3 sentences: overall assessment and your recommendation. -->
**Verdict:** <!-- Approve / Request changes / Comment -->


## Findings

### 🔴 High
<!-- Blocking issues: bugs, security holes, data loss, broken acceptance criteria.
     Must be resolved before merge. Write "None." if there are none. -->
-

### 🟡 Medium
<!-- Should fix: correctness risks, missing tests, perf concerns, unclear logic. -->
-

### 🟢 Low
<!-- Nice to have: style, naming, minor refactors, nits. Non-blocking. -->
-


## Concerns
<!-- Open questions, risky assumptions, or things outside this PR's scope worth flagging.
     Not necessarily actionable — but the author should be aware. -->
-


## Suggested fixes
<!-- A few concrete, prioritized actions. Reference file:line where possible.
     Keep it short — the highest-leverage changes only. -->
1.
2.
3.
